entry.em: ..FLOOD WATCH REMAINS IN EFFECT THROUGH SUNDAY MORNING

entry.data:
SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL IN THE EVENING
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS AROUND 70
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SUNNY WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

CLEAR, HOT
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
